Petition To Determine Characterization Of Wells Fargo Account; Verifications
Petition To Determine Entitlement To Estate

Petition To Determine Characterization Of Wells Fargo Account; Verifications
Off Calendar Apr-21-2026 Continued To Jul-28-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Simon appeared via zoom for Atonio Urbina (petitioner).
James Ficenec appeared via zoom for and with Rhonda MacAndrew and Madelyn Piar-Katter (objectors).

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than July 14, 2026. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by July 16, 2026. The matter is continued to and the Parties are to return on July 28, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Fajardo. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order

Petitioner Antonio Urbinas Petition For Family Allowance
Off Calendar Oct-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
David Simon and Randall Schmidt for petitioner Antonio Urbina, who was also present (in person).
James Ficenec objectors Rhonda MacAndrew, Madelyn Piar-Katter, and Jacqueline Thomas (via Zoom).

Mr. Simon stated that his client is bondable for $1,884, 000.00, that living off $3,500.00 is not sufficient, that his expenses are around $6,500.00 a month, and that they would like to be reimbursed for all out of pocket expenses totaling over $30,000.00. Based on counsels representation in court , The Court ordered $1,500.00 retroactive pay from September 1, 2024 and shall expire on April 28, 2026, and also reimbursement of $29,000.00 to the petitioner. The matters are taken under submission.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported

Petitioner Antonio Urbinas Petition For Family Allowance
Off Calendar Oct-07-2025 Continued To Oct-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Simon and Randall Schmidt for petitioner Antonio Urbina, who was also present (via Zoom).
Andrea Nguyen for objectors Rhonda MacAndrew, Madelyn Piar-Katter, and Jacqueline Thomas (via Zoom).
Rhonda MacAndrew and Madelyn Piar-Katter were also present (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on 1) Petition for Family Allowance; and 2) Petition for Letters of Administration.

The Court noted that a supplemental report had been filed late on October 6, 2025, and that it had not yet been reviewed. The Court inquired whether the parties had met and conferred regarding the family allowance and encouraged consideration of informal resolution.

Mr. Simon stated that his office would reach out to opposing counsel to discuss an agreement on the family allowance and suggested a short-set return date.

The Court continued the matter to October 28, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Cindee Mayfield; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
